title: pilosella subaurantiaca
intro: Pilosella subaurantiaca, also known as autumn hawk's beard, is a perennial plant in the dandelion family with yellow flowers and a hairy stem. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenoids and flavonoids. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Pilosella subaurantiaca can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a popular remedy among herbalists and natural health enthusiasts.
